'''Sorran''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Agamar/Legends|Agamari]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and commander of the ''[[Velumina]]''. In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] he was hired to [[Battle at TFP-9|attack]] [[Station TFP-9]] to capture several [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1s]].<ref name="The Starfighter Trap" />

*{{GamerCite|1|The Starfighter Trap}} {{1st}}
